1: I will sing and give praise, even with my glory.
2: I myself myself will awake early.
3: And I will sing praises unto thee among the nations.
4: And thy truth reacheth reacheth unto the clouds.
5: And thy glory above all the earth;
6: Save with with thy right hand, and answer me.
7: I will rejoice, I will divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.
9: Over Edom will I cast out my shoe; Over Philistia will I triumph.
10: Who will lead me into Edom?
11: And wilt not thou, O God, go forth with our hosts?
12: For vain is is the help of man.
13: For he it is that it is that shall tread down our enemies.
